title: incident_triage
description: The on-call triage verdict for a production alert: a severity, a one-line summary, and a recommended next action the incident loop routes on.

severity.description: sev1 = customer-facing outage / data loss, page now; sev2 = degraded but contained; sev3 = minor / cosmetic, can wait.

summary.description: One crisp line stating what is broken and the likely blast radius.

recommendation.description: mitigate = a known fix can be applied now; escalate = page the owning team / on-call; monitor = watch, no action yet.

suspected_cause.description: The single most likely cause, grounded in the alert text. Empty when unknown.

mitigation.description: When recommendation is mitigate: the concrete action to take (e.g. 'roll back deploy abc123', 'restart the queue worker'). Empty otherwise.
